validationPlans.title: Validate SEO/GEO 自动化内容集群
validationPlans.objective: Validate whether SEO/GEO 自动化内容集群 can produce near-term purchase intent before heavy development.
validationPlans.hypothesis: If ENHE presents a clear SEO/GEO 自动化内容集群 offer, users will click CTA, leave leads, or place at least one presale order.
validationPlans.successMetric: Indexed content page, impressions, CTA clicks, or leads.
validationPlans.minimumSuccessThreshold: Indexed or impressions recorded, plus CTA clicks >= 10 or leads >= 3.
requiredAssets: SEO/GEO 自动化内容集群 content brief
codexTasks: Draft one focused SEO/GEO 自动化内容集群 validation page with pricing, FAQ, and CTA.
Add tracking notes for CTA clicks, leads, and manual purchase intent.
Create one comparison or use-case content brief supporting SEO/GEO 自动化内容集群.
humanTasks: Review the SEO/GEO 自动化内容集群 offer and decide the validation price.
Respond manually to leads or presale inquiries within 24 hours.
risks: 竞争风险较高，必须先用细分场景和交付物做差异化。
Competitor signals do not prove traffic, sales, or revenue.

stopDoing.title: Do not optimize UI endlessly
stopDoing.reason: Without first-revenue evidence, UI polish should not displace validation work.

stopDoing.title: Do not build too many products at once
stopDoing.reason: Cross-evidence prioritization is designed to keep this week to one main validation and one backup.

stopDoing.title: Do not start heavy development before revenue proof
stopDoing.reason: firstRevenueAchieved=false means heavy builds should wait for landing page, content, marketplace, or pricing validation.
